data.reasoningText: The user wants to run their .NET tests and generate a TRX report. Let me look at the project files first and then run the tests.

arguments.description: Run dotnet tests with TRX logger

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-3f25f589ef324858bb5cbe18f566937f && dotnet test --logger \"trx;LogFileName=TestResults.trx\" 2>&1", "description": "Run dotnet tests with TRX logger", "initial_wait": 60}
